commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `ThreadLabel` from cached Telegram `topicName` in `buildTelegramInboundContextPayload` so forum-topic session metadata can use the known topic name.

PR surface: Source +1. Total +1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main can resolve `TopicName`, while the session/display paths consume `ThreadLabel` or stored display metadata. I did not run a live Telegram forum group in this read-only review.
